designBrief.silhouette: broad low chassis, obvious rotating turret, single main cannon
designBrief.palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a green faction armored frontline combat vehicle in an alien RTS. Material: alien composite shell, grown-metal surfaces. Palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: semi-organic, flowing conduits, chitinous panels, grav skirt glow. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: crane arms, cargo hoppers, multiple long barrels. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, orthographic texture sheet depicting the hull material of a heavy frontline alien combat vehicle. The surface is a deep, iridescent moss-metal, appearing as if ancient biological growth has fused with advanced alloys, creating a robust, composite shell. Intricate patterns of grown-metal ripple across the surface, resembling organic musculature or layered mineral deposits, interwoven with fine, hairline cracks and micro-etchings that reveal subtle industrial markings. Throughout this complex skin, slender green and teal emissive conduits pulse with a soft glow, tracing fluid, non-Euclidean pathways that seem to nourish or power the hull, embedded flush with the surface. The entire texture is presented as a perfectly flat, evenly lit diffuse map, devoid of perspective, baked shadows, or any textual overlays, showcasing imaginative alien industrial surface detail that suggests complex internal systems just beneath the unique grown-metal exterior.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture map showcasing the armored hull plating of a green frontline alien combat vehicle. The material is a rugged, deep moss-metal composite, featuring overlapping, asymmetrical plates of alien origin that exhibit characteristic grown-metal textures and organic, vein-like striations. Between these robust plates, thin gaps and channels glow softly with an internal green and teal emissive light, suggesting power conduits or energy veins that flow beneath the protective shell. Surface details include irregularly spaced hexagonal vents, subtle bio-luminescent glyphs etched into the grown-metal, and areas where the composite shell appears hardened and scarred from previous engagements, all while maintaining a pristine, unshaded, and untextured flat presentation. This texture is intended as a pure diffuse albedo, free from any perspective distortion, baked lighting, or superimposed text, highlighting an imaginative and functional alien industrial design.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
